node.statement: (Abelian algebra setup). Let A = C(X) for a compact Hausdorff space X. The involution is pointwise conjugation f*(x) = f(x)̄, and A^{sa} = C(X, R) (real-valued continuous functions). By Riesz representation, S(C(X)) is the set of Borel probability measures on X: φ ↦ μ_φ where φ(f) = ∫_X f dμ_φ.
